name: Rectangle Quad Vessel Network (500)
pi: Etienne Jessen, Marc C. Steinbach, Charlotte Debbaut, Dominik Schillinger, Mariia Myshkina, Matthias König
institution: Technical University of Darmstadt, Institute of Mechanics
Leibniz Universität Hannover, Institute of Applied Mathematics
description: Synthetic hepatic quad-tree vascular network (500 terminal segments) on a rectangular domain, generated by rigorous mathematical optimization (CCO + NLP).
